verdict.reasoning: FixedEtherVault.withdrawAll() uses the noReentrant modifier from ReentrancyGuard, which sets the lock before the function body and clears it afterward, preventing reentry during the external call to msg.sender.call{value: balance}(''). The function also follows checks-effects-interactions by zeroing userBalances[msg.sender] before the transfer, so there is no classic, cross-function, or cross-contract reentrancy window. Slither reported no reentrancy findings, which is consistent with the source.
